definition: Pre-irrigation reference VWC for one event.
formula_or_rule: Median VWC over the lookback window before irrigation_start; baseline_time is the last timestamp in that lookback window.

definition: Maximum post-irrigation VWC found in the search window for one event.
formula_or_rule: Maximum VWC after irrigation_start within the peak search window.

definition: Increase from baseline to peak for one event.
Estimated stabilized VWC below the maximum peak after irrigation for one event.
formula_or_rule: Median VWC over the detected plateau window; if no flat segment is found, use the fallback window after peak.

definition: Elapsed time from irrigation_start to peak VWC for one event.
Elapsed time from irrigation_start to plateau attainment for one event.
Additional time after irrigation shutoff before plateau is reached for one event.
Length of time irrigation water was running for one event.
Water delivered to the active strip pair/group.
formula_or_rule: Read from clean irrigation events table.

definition: Water assigned to one individual strip.
Average strip-level application flow rate during one irrigation event.
Method used to estimate plateau_vwc for one event.
formula_or_rule: flat_segment = sustained low-slope zone found; fallback_window = delayed post-peak summary window used; no_peak = no meaningful wetting peak detected.

definition: Probe depth index in the logger naming convention.
Probe depth in inches.
Change in estimated profile water storage during one event.
Fraction of strip-applied irrigation volume retained in measured profile storage.
Applied strip volume not accounted for as measured profile storage gain.
Operational target VWC based on historical plateau responses.
Recommended runtime in hours based on historical event response.
formula_or_rule: Median, mean, or p75 of time_to_plateau_hours within each group

definition: Recommended runtime in minutes based on historical event response.
